routa.config.executablePath: Path to the Routa CLI executable. Leave empty to use the bundled binary, the repository build output, or routa on PATH.
routa.config.port: Local Routa server port. Use 0 to choose an available random port.
routa.config.staticDir: Path to a Routa static frontend export. Leave empty to use the packaged frontend or the repository out directory.
routa.config.extraArgs: Extra arguments appended to the routa server command.
routa.config.autoRegisterCurrentFolder: Automatically create a Routa workspace and codebase for the current VS Code workspace folder.
